DAILY.LOCKED.description: Play a single run with all characters and beat Act 3 to unlock the Daily Run.
DAILY.description:
A new challenge is available once a day.

Compete with other players for the highest score!
DAILY.title: Daily
DAILY_MP.description:
A new challenge is available once a day.

Compete with other groups for the highest score!
DAILY_MP.title: Daily
DAILY_RUN_MENU.LEADERBOARDS.noFriends:
None of your friends have submitted a score.
Tell your friends to play!
DAILY_RUN_MENU.LEADERBOARDS.noScore:
No scores have been submitted.
Get climbing!
DAILY_RUN_MENU.LEADERBOARDS.title: Leaderboards
DAILY_RUN_MENU.NO_UPLOAD_HOVERTIP.descri:
You can only upload one score for each daily.

You can still try the daily again, but your new score will not be uploaded.
DAILY_RUN_MENU.NO_UPLOAD_HOVERTIP.title: Daily Already Completed!
EARLY_ACCESS_DISCLAIMER.description_cont:
[gold][b]Slay the Spire 2[/b][/gold] is in Early Access. That means it's not done yet!

More cards, monsters, and other content will be added but we also need to fix issues, ensure it's balanced, and improve some features here and there.

Help us out by reporting any issues or providing comments through our [gold]Feedback Form[/gold] in the Settings menu.

Alright, you have a Spire to climb!
EARLY_ACCESS_DISCLAIMER.description_mkb:
[gold][b]Slay the Spire 2[/b][/gold] is in Early Access. That means it's not done yet!

More cards, monsters, and other content will be added but we also need to fix issues, ensure it's balanced, and improve some features here and there.

Help us out by reporting any issues or providing comments through our [gold]Feedback Form[/gold] by pressing [blue]F2[/blue]. There's also a button in the Settings menu.

Alright, you have a Spire to climb!
ENABLE_TUTORIALS.description:
[center]It looks like this is your first time playing [gold][b]Slay the Spire[/b][/gold]!

Do you want a brief tutorial and some messages to help you out?
ENABLE_TUTORIALS.title: Enable Tutorials?
HOST.description: Host a standard, daily, or custom run for up to four players.
HOST.title: Host
INVALID_SAVE_POPUP.description_progress:
There was a problem loading your progress save file.

Please send a bug report so we can fix the issue.
INVALID_SAVE_POPUP.description_run:
This run is not able to be loaded.

Please send a bug report so we can fix the issue.
INVALID_SAVE_POPUP.description_settings:
There was a problem loading your settings save file.

Please send a bug report so we can fix the issue.
INVALID_SAVE_POPUP.title: Corrupt Save!

LEADERBOARDS.description: View and compare your score with friends and other players.
LEADERBOARDS.title: Leaderboards
LOADING_OVERLAY.label: Loading...
MODDING_POPUP.description:
DO NOT LOAD MODS FROM AN UNTRUSTED SOURCE! Mods can harm your computer!

If you did not download mods, or you do not trust them, press cancel.

If you press Load Mods, you will need to relaunch the game.
MODDING_POPUP.title: Load Mods?
MOD_NOT_LOADED_POPUP.description: New mods were detected, but they won't work until after a restart.
MOD_NOT_LOADED_POPUP.title: Mod Not Loaded
MP_ABANDON.description: Abandon your last hosted multiplayer run.
MP_ABANDON.title: Abandon Save
MP_LOAD.description: Continue your last multiplayer run. Only players that were in the run can join.
MP_LOAD.title: Host from Save
MULTIPLAYER_WARNING_POPUP.body:
We recommend that you first try Singleplayer to familiarize yourself with the basics and unlock some items.

You have been warned!
MULTIPLAYER_WARNING_POPUP.title: First Run Detected!
NETWORK_ERROR.FAILED_TO_HOST.body:
Could not start hosting. Check your internet connection.

More info: {info}
NETWORK_ERROR.INTERNAL_ERROR.body:
An internal error occurred.

More info: {info}
NETWORK_ERROR.JOIN_BLOCKED_BY_USER.body: You were banned or blocked by someone in the lobby.
NETWORK_ERROR.KICKED.body: You were kicked from the game.
NETWORK_ERROR.MOD_MISMATCH.description.m: We have mods that host does not: {mods}
Host has mods that we do not: {mods}
NETWORK_ERROR.NOT_IN_SAVE_GAME.body: Attempted to join a run loaded from save, but you were not in the original run.
NETWORK_ERROR.NO_INTERNET.body:
Unable to connect. Check your internet connection.

More info: {info}
NETWORK_ERROR.RUN_IN_PROGRESS.body: The run is already in progress.
NETWORK_ERROR.STATE_DIVERGENCE.body:
You have run into a multiplayer state divergence!

Please send us a bug report.
NETWORK_ERROR.TRY_AGAIN_LATER.body: Too many attempts. Try again after some time has passed.
NETWORK_ERROR.UNKNOWN_ERROR.body:
An unknown error occurred.

More info: {info}
NETWORK_ERROR.VERSION_MISMATCH.body: The player you attempted to join is running a version of STS2 that does not match yours.
